stories.definitionOfDone: • Architecture Design: Design of the insulin delivery module, including the user interface and pump control algorithms.
stories.description: The system must be available to deliver insulin when required.
stories.testCases:
Test: be available to deliver insulin when required.
Expected: System performs be available to deliver insulin when required. successfully with valid output data
stories.title: Be Available To Deliver Insulin

stories.definitionOfDone: • Unit Tests: Unit tests for the insulin delivery algorithm to ensure accuracy and reliability.
stories.description: The system shall perform reliably and deliver the correct amount of insulin to counteract the current level of blood sugar.
stories.testCases:
Test: perform reliably and deliver the correct amount of insulin to counteract the current level of blood sugar.
Expected: System performs perform reliably and deliver the correct amount of insulin to counteract the current level of blood sugar. successfully with valid output data
stories.title: Perform Reliably Deliver Correct Amount

stories.definitionOfDone: • Database Schema Design: Design of the database schema to store blood glucose level data from the microsensor.
stories.description: The system shall accurately measure blood glucose levels using a microsensor.
stories.testCases:
Test: accurately measure blood glucose levels using a microsensor.
Expected: System performs accurately measure blood glucose levels using a microsensor. successfully with valid output data
stories.title: Accurately Measure Blood Glucose Levels

stories.definitionOfDone: • User Training Documentation: User training documentation for the insulin calculation algorithm, including explanations of how it works and any limitations.
stories.description: The system shall calculate the correct dose of insulin based on the measured blood glucose level and other relevant factors.
stories.testCases:
Test: calculate the correct dose of insulin based on the measured blood glucose level and other relevant factors.
Expected: System performs calculate the correct dose of insulin based on the measured blood glucose level and other relevant factors. successfully with valid output data
stories.title: Calculate Correct Dose Of Insulin
